text: Moving from the quiet, open expanse of the first room to the vibrant, stimulating exhibit of the second, I feel a subtle shift inside me. The emptiness and light in the first space evoke a sense of anticipation, almost isolation—like standing at the edge of a threshold, ready for something to unfold. Entering the R+D area fills me with curiosity; the colors and screens pulse with creative purpose. Here, I feel energized and slightly overwhelmed, as though knowledge is alive and inviting me to participate in its discovery. The contrast reminds me how space shapes my mood and awareness.
